subcodes.first_line: O cherished trustee, the letter thou didst pen to his honour the Afnán hath been perused, and from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین نازنین مکتوبی که بجناب افنان مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید و از خبر
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wisdom [hikmat]
